title.zh-CN: 应用内更新与统一发布日志
title.en-US: In-app updates and unified release notes

summary.zh-CN: 引入应用内更新基础设施，并将 GitHub Release、更新清单与客户端版本新内容统一到同一份双语数据源。
summary.en-US: Introduces the in-app update foundation and unifies GitHub Releases, updater metadata, and in-app What's New content under one bilingual source.

zh-CN: 设置页「关于」新增手动检查更新入口和更新状态。
启动后静默检查新版本，发现更新时提供非阻塞提示。
安装更新并重启后首次展示当前版本的新内容。
en-US: Added manual update checks and update status to Settings > About.
Added a silent startup update check with a non-blocking availability notice.
Added a one-time What's New dialog after an update is installed and relaunched.

zh-CN: GitHub Release 正文、CHANGELOG 和 updater notes 改为由结构化双语发布日志统一生成。
后续 Early Preview 版本使用普通 Release 通道，保证 latest.json 地址稳定可用。
en-US: GitHub Release bodies, CHANGELOG, and updater notes now come from one structured bilingual source.
Future Early Preview builds use the regular Release channel so the latest.json endpoint remains stable.

summary.zh-CN: 首个稳定性与诊断维护版本，继续定位为 Early Preview。
summary.en-US: The first stability and diagnostics maintenance release, still designated as Early Preview.

zh-CN: 在设置页「通用」中新增环境诊断，检查配置文件、工具路径、Skill 来源和分发状态。
在 Skill 侧边栏和详情页展示来源缺失、分发断开与目标缺失状态，并支持定位异常工具。
新增持久错误 Toast，对配置和工具路径的严重问题提供全局提示。
新增排障指南，并完善 Bug、功能建议与 Discussions 的 GitHub Issue 入口。
en-US: Added environment diagnostics for config, tool paths, Skill sources, and distribution status.
Added source and distribution issue indicators with navigation to affected tools.
Added persistent global notices for critical config and tool-path failures.
Added troubleshooting documentation and improved GitHub issue entry points.

zh-CN: 补充导入、分发、配置和 Git 操作的中英文错误提示。
工具路径、Skill 和 Distribution 发生变化后自动刷新诊断结果。
配置可写诊断与实际的临时文件替换保存机制保持一致。
en-US: Expanded bilingual errors for import, distribution, config, and Git operations.
Diagnostics now refresh after tool path, Skill, and Distribution changes.
Config writability checks now match the actual atomic replacement save path.

zh-CN: 修复项目级分发变化后侧边栏与诊断状态未及时刷新的问题。
修复 Git 工作区状态检查失败时被误报为存在未提交改动的问题。
en-US: Fixed stale sidebar and diagnostics state after project distribution changes.
Fixed Git worktree inspection failures being reported as uncommitted changes.

summary.zh-CN: Kitestring 首次公开发布，定位为 Early Preview。
summary.en-US: The initial public release of Kitestring, designated as Early Preview.

zh-CN: 支持从本地文件夹或 GitHub 仓库导入包含 SKILL.md 的 Skill。
支持解析 SKILL.md 元数据并通过 symlink 分发到五类 AI 工具。
支持项目扫描、分发状态、文件预览、分组和中英文界面。
en-US: Added Skill imports from local folders and GitHub repositories.
Added SKILL.md metadata parsing and symlink distribution to five AI tool types.
Added project scanning, distribution status, file preview, groups, and bilingual UI.

zh-CN: Windows 安装包暂未代码签名，Windows 10+ 需要 WebView2。
Git 拉取仅支持干净工作区下的 fast-forward 更新。
SKILL.md front matter 使用轻量解析器，不是完整 YAML 解析器。
en-US: Windows installers are not code-signed and require WebView2 on Windows 10+.
Git pull only supports fast-forward updates from a clean working tree.
SKILL.md front matter uses a lightweight parser rather than a full YAML parser.
